title: Job Applications Essentials
description:
In today’s competitive job market, standing out means more than just listing your experience, it’s about telling your story visually and authentically. Job Application Essentials, taught by Adobe experts, helps you craft polished, professional materials that reflect your personal brand and creativity. 

You’ll learn to build visually engaging resumes, cover letters, and LinkedIn profiles using Adobe Express and Acrobat, while applying storytelling and design principles that set you apart. Along the way, you’ll explore power skills like creativity, critical thinking, and communication, so you can confidently present your best self to recruiters and hiring managers. Whether you’re entering the workforce, pivoting careers, or refreshing your materials, this course equips you with the tools and insights to make a lasting impression.
